description.p: You have mastered the art of stillness to such a degree that your body obeys thought without delay. By entering a state of perfect calm, you unleash explosive motion.
Prerequisite: Strength 15 or higher, Dexterity 15 or higher, 16th level or higher.

ul.li: As a bonus action, you can enter a state of Momentum. This state lasts for 1 minute and requires concentration (as if concentrating on a spell). It does not count as a spell.
While Momentum is active, you gain the benefits of the haste spell, targeting only yourself. When Momentum ends, you suffer the lethargy effect as normal.
While Momentum is active, you ignore difficult terrain for all movement.
You can use Momentum twice, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

description.p: Meditative Focus (Special): If you spend 1 uninterrupted hour meditating, or complete a short rest in calm focus, you awaken heightened spatial awareness. The next time you activate Momentum before completing another long rest, you gain blindsight out to a range of 15 feet for the duration. If you use Momentum again, you must meditate again to gain this benefit.

sheet.description: Bonus Action: Enter Momentum for 1 minute (concentration). Gain the benefits of haste (self only). Ignore difficult terrain. After it ends, suffer lethargy as normal. 2 uses per long rest. Special: If you meditate 1 hour or complete a short rest in calm focus, your next Momentum grants Blindsight 15 ft for its duration. This benefit is consumed when Momentum is used.
